content.text:
<timestamp>Monday, Jul 6, 2026, 11:34 PM (UTC+3:30)</timestamp>
<user_query>
Create the following C# source files in D:\napsterProject\src\NapsternetVClient\ exactly as specified. Use namespace NapsternetVClient.* matching folder structure.

1. Converters/XrayConfigBuilder.cs - Full Xray JSON builder from ServerProfile (SOCKS 10808, HTTP 10809, vmess/vless/trojan/ss/socks outbounds, stream settings, routing with geosite/geoip, dns). Copy from standard v2rayN-style config.

2. Core/XrayProcessManager.cs - Start/stop xray.exe child process, log capture, IDisposable

3. Core/SingBoxProcessManager.cs - TUN mode sing-box config generator and process manager, forwards to local SOCKS

4. Core/BinaryManager.cs - Download xray, sing-box, wintun, geo files, AND Pantegnos release as npvt-decoder.exe from https://api.github.com/repos/FrontierTM/Pantegnos/releases/latest (look for windows amd64 exe asset)

5. Core/ProcessGuard.cs - lock file cleanup on dirty session

6. Network/NetworkInterop.cs - InternetSetOption P/Invoke with LibraryImport

7. Network/SystemProxyManager.cs - registry proxy set/clear with state restore

8. Network/KillSwitchManager.cs - optional firewall block when tunnel drops (simple implementation using netsh or just document stub that blocks non-local when enabled)

9. Services/ProfileService.cs - CRUD with DPAPI encryption to profiles.dat (use DpapiHelper), fallback migrate from profiles.json

10. Services/ConnectionService.cs - orchestrates connect/disconnect, system proxy vs TUN

Write complete working code. Return list of files created.
</user_query>

I'll explore the project structure and existing types first, then create the C# files to match your spec.

[REDACTED]

input.final_summary: Created all 10 requested C# source files under `D:\napsterProject\src\NapsternetVClient\` with namespaces matching folder structure. The new modules cover Xray config generation, process management (xray/sing-box), binary downloads (including Pantegnos npvt-decoder), dirty-session cleanup, system proxy/kill-switch networking, and profile/connection orchestration. Note: full solution build currently fails due to a pre-existing syntax error in `ViewModels/MainViewModel.cs`, not in these new files.

content.text:
All 10 C# source files were created under `D:\napsterProject\src\NapsternetVClient\`:

| # | File | Namespace | Purpose |
|---|------|-----------|---------|
| 1 | `Converters/XrayConfigBuilder.cs` | `NapsternetVClient.Converters` | Builds v2rayN-style Xray JSON from `ServerProfile` (SOCKS 10808, HTTP 10809, vmess/vless/trojan/ss/socks outbounds, stream settings, geosite/geoip routing, DNS) |
| 2 | `Core/XrayProcessManager.cs` | `NapsternetVClient.Core` | Starts/stops `xray.exe`, captures stdout/stderr logs, implements `IDisposable` |
| 3 | `Core/SingBoxProcessManager.cs` | `NapsternetVClient.Core` | Generates TUN-mode sing-box config forwarding to local SOCKS, manages `sing-box.exe` process |
| 4 | `Core/BinaryManager.cs` | `NapsternetVClient.Core` | Downloads xray, sing-box, wintun, geo files, and Pantegnos `npvt-decoder.exe` from GitHub releases |
| 5 | `Core/ProcessGuard.cs` | `NapsternetVClient.Core` | Detects dirty sessions via `.connected` lock file, kills orphan processes, restores proxy/kill-switch |
| 6 | `Network/NetworkInterop.cs` | `NapsternetVClient.Network` | `InternetSetOption` P/Invoke via `LibraryImport` to refresh proxy settings |
| 7 | `Network/SystemProxyManager.cs` | `NapsternetVClient.Network` | Sets/clears Windows registry proxy with snapshot restore |
| 8 | `Network/KillSwitchManager.cs` | `NapsternetVClient.Network` | Optional netsh advfirewall kill switch (blocks outbound except loopback/private) |
| 9 | `Services/ProfileService.cs` | `NapsternetVClient.Services` | CRUD for profiles with DPAPI encryption to `profiles.dat`, migrates from `profiles.json` |
| 10 | `Services/ConnectionService.cs` | `NapsternetVClient.Services` | Orchestrates connect/disconnect for System Proxy vs TUN modes |

**Integration highlights:**
- Uses existing `Constants`, `DpapiHelper`, `LogRedactor`, `ElevationHelper`, and `ServerProfile` models
- `ConnectionService` wires together `BinaryManager` → `XrayConfigBuilder` → process managers → proxy/TUN/kill-switch
- `BinaryManager` fetches Pantegnos from `Constants.PantegnosReleaseApiUrl`, matching a Windows amd64 `.exe` asset and saving it as `npvt-decoder.exe`

**Build note:** `dotnet build` currently fails due to a pre-existing syntax error in `ViewModels/MainViewModel.cs` (line 397), not in these new files. The new modules themselves have no linter issues.

[REDACTED]
